INSERT INTO project (
  id,
  name,
  type,
  "createdAt",
  "updatedAt",
  "creatorId"
)
VALUES (
  substring(md5(random()::text), 1, 16), -- genera id tipo n8n
  'luis pardo <lspardo@uniboyaca.edu.co>',
  'personal',
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  '30c39b78-ac34-4297-bc8a-637d5069fedb'
);

INSERT INTO project (
  id,
  name,
  type,
  "createdAt",
  "updatedAt",
  "creatorId"
)
VALUES (
  substring(md5(random()::text), 1, 16), -- genera id tipo n8n
  '{{ $json.firstName }} {{ $json.lastName }} <{{ $json.email }}>',
  'personal',
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  '{{ $json.id }}'
);
